# Connector Service — LLM Navigation Index
# Connectors: 80
#
# This file helps AI coding assistants navigate connector-service documentation.
# Each connector block lists: doc path, scenarios, supported payment methods,
# supported flows, and paths to runnable Python/JavaScript examples.
#
# Usage: fetch this file first, then fetch the specific connector doc or example.

overview:
  total_connectors: 80
  docs_root: docs-generated/connectors/
  examples_root: examples/
  all_connectors_matrix: docs-generated/all_connector.md

integration_pattern:
  1. Configure ConnectorConfig with connector name and credentials
  2. Call flows in sequence per scenario (see Integration Scenarios in connector doc)
  3. Branch on response.status: AUTHORIZED / PENDING / FAILED
  4. PENDING means await webhook or poll Get before capturing
  5. Pass connector_transaction_id from Authorize response to Capture/Refund

---


connector: aci
  display_name: ACI
  doc: docs-generated/connectors/aci.md
  examples:
    python: examples/aci/python/aci.py
    javascript: examples/aci/javascript/aci.js
    kotlin: examples/aci/kotlin/aci.kt
    rust: examples/aci/rust/aci.rs
  flows: authenticate, authorize, capture, create_access_token, create_customer, create_order, create_session_token, dispute_accept, dispute_defend, dispute_submit_evidence...
  scenarios: checkout_card, refund_payment, setup_recurring, recurring_charge, void_authorization, get_payment_status, partial_refund, multi_capture, incremental_authorization, checkout_3ds, checkout_bnpl

  scenarios: checkout_card, refund_payment, void_authorization, get_payment_status, partial_refund, incremental_authorization, checkout_3ds
